assertion_results.text: The skill stops execution after identifying missing sections — it does NOT proceed to Steps 2-5 (Step 1 stop rule)

The skill did NOT proceed to Steps 2 through 7.' No Steps 2-7 output appears anywhere in the file; only Step 0 and Step 1 are present.

The bug description does not follow the template at `docs/templates/bug-template.md`.' Both specific missing section names and the bug template path are present.
